Alright, hello everybody. I am super excited to have you inside 10x launches. I'm excited for you, I'm excited for your customers, your family, your friends, your pets, and quite frankly, just anybody who stands to benefit from you creating your sales messaging faster and with more genuine impact and results. We're talking about messages that don't make your audience cringe but instead really connect to those deep hidden places within them and really empower them to better their lives in ways that you and your programs are uniquely equipped to deliver. This journey really got started a few years ago for me. It started when I was getting hired to write all these massive launches and had to do them quick. The most stressful part wasn't actually the writing itself but the lack of a clear repeatable methodology or process for doing it. What made it even more challenging was that this was during a period of time when the online world was suffering from what I call a marketing global health crisis called funnel fever. This was a time when new launch strategies and funnel strategies were literally popping up almost every month. We had evergreen webinars, we had normal webinars, we had three-part video series, we had challenges and Facebook groups and all sorts of things popping up and there was really no replicable system that I could use to write the copy for them. Every battle really felt vastly different. That's actually exactly what it felt like. It felt like a battle. Every time I got hired, I felt like a mercenary being called back onto the field with a new set of tools and weapons and just trying to rediscover how to use them. Over the past 24 months, even more and more coaches, educators and experts and influencers have been coming into the online space and creating and launching online courses and programs. It's actually become even more imperative to create a highly effective, efficient and most importantly, a funnel agnostic process for creating high converting sales campaigns and copy that doesn't take weeks to put together. When I say funnel agnostic, what I'm talking about is really, we're going to have launch strategies and funnel strategies that evolve all the time. In the resources section, we put together a few that we're very familiar with and we know those authors and they've really been vetted. But at the time of this recording, it's 2017 right now. I'd expect that over the course of the next few months, we're going to get even more options and ways for you to be launching your product. At the end of the day, all these systems may be excellent, but unless you have a way of writing the sales messages that plug into them, that's agnostic, that's really a skill, a repeatable process, we're going to run into a problem, we're going to run into the bottleneck problem. This is what I've really noticed and what spurred the creation of this program is I've noticed that creating the sales messaging for launches for funnels has become the biggest bottleneck. That's what really sparks those desperate 2AM Skype messages from people who just got referred from another client and they're desperate and they really need their email copy written for their launch. They've already invested thousands in their team and ads and hundreds of man hours. They've come to the conclusion that those little innocent email icons on the funnel map don't actually write themselves and it sounds absurd, but that's really what's happening. We get so enamored, so romantic about the funnels we're using that we forget that the connective tissue, the thing that actually brings life to them, are the messages we plug into it. That's become a major bottleneck where for every funnel that gets built, for every 100 funnels that people set out to build, how many of them are actually going live and how many of those that are going live are actually generating profits. This is a critical problem we have right now and it's actually going to only get bigger as our funnels get more and more complex and we get more and more enraptured by them. We still need to learn a repeatable process for dialing in the messaging and getting that done in an efficient way. That's the point of this course. It's really to create a repeatable process for doing that, to give you the confidence to do it yourself. Yes, there may be a time and place to hand it off to a copywriter, but you'd be shocked how infrequent that time and place arises. Many of my clients who are super busy, some of the busiest entrepreneurs on the planet are still taking the time to learn how to do this. The key study I always like to refer to is Dan Martel, an incredible entrepreneur who at one point fired me as his copywriter and hired me as his copywriting coach. He really acknowledged how vital, how crucial this skill is, how intimately tied it is to revenue generation and he decided, I need to take ownership of this. This course 10x launches is really meant to honor the commitment of every entrepreneur who wants to take ownership of this process and to actually give them a learnable and repeatable process for doing it. This is going to work no matter what kind of launch you're doing. Later on in the course, you're actually going to see theme plates for what I call the minimum viable email funnel where you literally actually need nothing but an email software to launch your products or courses. However, like I said, the strategies and templates you're going to be learning in this course are going to sync up with any funnel you are using. They are foundational. We're really talking about the lifeblood that goes into any funnel you're building. So that's what's coming up ahead. If you are a course creator, a coach, a consultant, an expert influencer or any type of online entrepreneur who is launching and selling products and building funnels with email, this really will be your ticket to more sales in less time, which will give you the confidence to double down on all those other aspects of your funnel. Knowing, and this is the important part, knowing that you have the sequence needed to convert those leads into customers. But this is actually also for copywriters and launch strategists. This is where I came from. It's for people who are doing this for a living who are afflicted by knowing that their time isn't scalable. Even if you do increase your rates to the highest, your market will bear, you'll still ultimately be capped by the amount of time you have to execute these launches. So this is a very strategic, methodical approach and process that along with the theme plates you're going to be introduced to later has really cut down my own fulfillment time on these launch projects in probably about half. While at the same time also being able to raise my rates to be in the line with the value and results that this method has generated for my clients. So that's the invitation for the copywriters tuning into this, is it really will give you a way to execute these quicker, you know, while also raising your rates. So that's really the fastest way to get paid more in line with what you're doing. But regardless of where you fall on that spectrum, here's where I want to invite you to add a comma to your title, add a comma conversion coach. Because that's really what we're doing here at the heart of what we're doing here. We are conversion coaches, you know, copywriting, maybe what you're used to calling the work ahead of us. But this really is about connecting deeply with your customer deeper than you ever have before, acknowledging exactly where they are and knowing that transformation they have to make between point A and point buyer to really, to really convert in your funnel. So while you know, by the end of the course, this is what we are going for, you will know exactly what kind of email to send at what time to move your leads along that buying journey. And you will know the right questions to ask to drive the content for those messages, you know, we talked so much about where does great copy come from, you know, and of course, we do have our quantitative data, we also have our survey results, we have all that. But the best messages, the best messages come from the conversion coach who's willing to just sit with it and pierce a little bit deeper and say, where did this response come from? What is driving this person to answer in this way? And what are the underlying thoughts and beliefs and attitudes that are driving that? And that really gives us a chance to dig deeper and really hit those underlying precursors that lead to greater conversions. By the end of this course, you will also find more effortlessness and ease in the process. You know, right now it's so daunting when entrepreneurs, you know, flip open the Mac book, like, you know, open up a new Google Doc and get faced with this buying page and have no idea what should go here. And they kind of just add a bit, they just wing it. And, you know, they're pressured by these deadlines, and they just have to get it out. So that's where you kind of put on your better done than perfect cap and just write whatever feels good without really relying on a strategy and without actually being confident that what you're writing is really strategically designed to convert. And that's what we're doing here. We are creating and you're going to learn how to create buyers by coaching the conversion instead of forcing it. One of the world's top coaches, Rich Litvin actually talks a lot about this, about creating clients, you know, clients are created. If you are a coach, if you are an educator, why would you wait until someone is in your program officially before coaching or educating them? You know, that really starts the moment they opt in, the moment they come into our ecosystem, we have a chance to create a client, create a buyer by really coaching that conversion, coaching who they must become to be a perfect client, instead of just ramming sales messages down their throat and, you know, hoping that one or two of them chokes on it. So that's one thing we're doing here. And finally, the reason I'm sure most of you joined it's to really generate record breaking results in your launches and funnels with far less effort or laboring over your email copy. So this is the biggie, you know, you know, I've worked on probably over a dozen six and seven figure launches by now. And people, you know, always kind of have asked me, you know, what is it about your copy that does this? And they're always looking for that kind of that formula, that tool, that way of turning the phrase. And it really, you know, that's where I kind of take a step back. And it's been frustrating for the people asking and frustrating for me to explain it. But it really has less to do with all of that and everything to do with just approaching it from the mindset of a conversion coach of really deeply getting to know who I'm communicating with and knowing what triggers I need to pull and really, you know, how I need to facilitate that change, you know, in them to become a perfect customer.
